overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a neon-lit covered market arcade at night. The environment features wet reflective floors, hanging red paper lanterns, elaborate neon ceiling installations, and various food stalls and shops. The player enters a small shop, examines items in the back room, and exits back into the main market area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cyberpunk food arcade with neon ceiling installation

events.description: ascending stairs into covered neon-lit market arcade
slowing slightly while navigating through pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered market arcade, observing the neon-lit environment and food stalls

notable_agents.action: person in white outfit walking ahead in the corridor

entered.detail: abstract flowing neon light sculpture in white, orange, and cyan hanging from ceiling
traditional red Japanese-style paper lanterns hanging along the left wall
metal food preparation counters with stools along the left side
large glowing advertisement screens on the right wall displaying product posters
shiny tiled floor reflecting the neon lights above

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends stairs into a covered cyberpunk market arcade illuminated by an elaborate neon ceiling installation and red paper lanterns. The wet tiled floor reflects the vibrant lights as the player walks forward through the corridor, passing digital advertisement screens on the right and food stall counters on the left. Sparse pedestrians walk through the space, including a person in white ahead in the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall area with seated customers and graffiti walls

events.description: slowing down to observe the food stall with seated customers
approaching the shop entrance with beaded curtain

agents.ego_description: walking past food stalls, observing customers seated at counters, approaching a shop entrance

notable_agents.action: person in bright pink shirt sitting at food counter eating
vendor standing behind food cart with glowing blue lights

entered.detail: large colorful graffiti mural on the left wall featuring abstract faces
mobile food cart with blue neon underlighting and cooking equipment
green beaded curtain covering a shop entrance ahead
large vertical advertisement screen for MIXIT product

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the arcade, the player passes a food stall where a person in a pink shirt sits eating at the counter, with colorful graffiti murals covering the left wall. The camera continues past a mobile food cart with blue neon lighting and approaches a shop entrance marked by a green beaded curtain. The environment maintains its neon-lit, wet-reflective aesthetic as the player navigates through the scattered pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: small shop interior with storage shelves and back room

events.description: entering the small shop through the beaded curtain
game UI appears offering interaction with items on shelves

agents.ego_description: entering the small shop, approaching the vendor, then moving into the back storage room to examine items

notable_agents.action: shop vendor in white shirt and apron standing behind counter, talking on phone

entered.detail: metal shelving units filled with boxes, books, and decorative items
small red neon sign shaped like a heart on the wall
stacked cardboard boxes on the floor and shelves
decorative ceramic vases and teapots on upper shelves
vertical banner sign with 'RyuLai' text and cloud logo

segments.scene_description: The player enters the small shop through the beaded curtain, transitioning to a narrower, more enclosed space with dimmer artificial lighting. Inside, a vendor in a white shirt stands behind the counter talking on the phone, while the player moves into the back storage room filled with metal shelves holding ceramic vases, cardboard boxes, and decorative items. A small red neon heart sign glows on the wall as the player examines the shelves, with game interaction prompts briefly appearing.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning to the main covered market arcade with neon lighting

events.description: exiting the shop back into the neon-lit market arcade
turning slightly to navigate around pedestrians in the open market area

agents.ego_description: exiting the shop back into the main market area, walking through the wet reflective corridor

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead in the market corridor wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: large neon sign spelling 'BEER' in pink and cyan letters
food and goods stalls with bright lighting along the right side
reflective wet floor showing neon reflections

segments.scene_description: Exiting the shop back into the main market arcade, the player returns to the neon-lit corridor with its wet reflective flooring. A large 'BEER' neon sign in pink and cyan illuminates the left side as the player walks past market stalls on the right. The camera continues through the scattered pedestrians, navigating the covered cyberpunk marketplace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a vibrant, neon-lit cyberpunk market that briefly dips into the dim intimacy of a small shop before returning to the bustling arcade. It begins by ascending stairs into a covered corridor where red paper lanterns and an elaborate neon ceiling reflect off wet tiled floors as the camera passes digital screens and food stalls. As the player moves deeper into the arcade past graffiti-covered walls and a blue-lit food cart, the scene shifts through a green beaded curtain into a narrower, dimly lit shop. The camera then navigates a cramped back storage room filled with metal shelves and a glowing red neon heart before turning back toward the exit. Finally, the view emerges from the shop and returns to the expansive market, passing a bright pink and cyan beer sign and scattered pedestrians under the glow of the neon installations.
